item.title: phillbarrs: Phill Barrs @phillbarrs · 16min Night one of WrestleMania disappointing, some solid matches but too predictable everythi
item.description:
Phill Barrs @phillbarrs · 16min Night one of WrestleMania disappointing, some solid matches but too predictable everything we saw coming. And the ending was a shocker.
Night two needs to be better #wrestlemania 2 146

item.title: phillbarrs: Phill Barrs @phillbarrs · 18min They got this ending very wrong Cita WWE WrestleMania @WrestleMania · 27min #ANDSTILL
item.description:
Phill Barrs @phillbarrs · 18min They got this ending very wrong Cita WWE WrestleMania @WrestleMania · 27min #ANDSTILL
@CodyRhodes RETAINS the Undisputed WWE Title at #WrestleMania! 1 1 43

item.title: DanDartsDawson: Dan Dawson @DanDartsDawson · 3h Jesus Christ, I am so bored of sports fans moaning about players showing any kind of emo
item.description: Dan Dawson @DanDartsDawson · 3h Jesus Christ, I am so bored of sports fans moaning about players showing any kind of emotion. "Celebrating like he's won the world championship" is it? Did you not watch the game? Did you not see the stress that he was under? That's what makes sport good, you clowns. 6 2 102 4 mil

item.title: joshpearson180: Josh @joshpearson180 · 3h En respuesta a @DanDartsDawson Don’t come on Twitter dot com and talk common sense Dan, you k
item.description: Josh @joshpearson180 · 3h En respuesta a @DanDartsDawson Don’t come on Twitter dot com and talk common sense Dan, you know that’s forbidden on here 7 862

item.title:

WHAT A WRESTLEMANIA MOM
item.description:
Phill Barrs @phillbarrs · 3h Things just got interesting Cita WWE @WWE · 3h PAIGE IS BACK!!!!!
WHAT A WRESTLEMANIA MOMENT!! 2 190

item.title:
livedarts: Live Darts @livedarts · 3h "𝙄 𝙠𝙣𝙤𝙬 𝙝𝙤𝙬 𝙜𝙤𝙤𝙙 𝙝𝙚 𝙞𝙨, 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙄 𝙠𝙣𝙤𝙬 𝙄 𝙝𝙖𝙫𝙚 𝙩𝙤 𝙥𝙡𝙖𝙮 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙨𝙖𝙢𝙚 𝙡𝙚𝙫𝙚𝙡 𝙖𝙨 𝙩𝙤𝙙𝙖𝙮."
Recap & reaction
item.description:
Live Darts @livedarts · 3h "𝙄 𝙠𝙣𝙤𝙬 𝙝𝙤𝙬 𝙜𝙤𝙤𝙙 𝙝𝙚 𝙞𝙨, 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙄 𝙠𝙣𝙤𝙬 𝙄 𝙝𝙖𝙫𝙚 𝙩𝙤 𝙥𝙡𝙖𝙮 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙨𝙖𝙢𝙚 𝙡𝙚𝙫𝙚𝙡 𝙖𝙨 𝙩𝙤𝙙𝙖𝙮."
Recap & reaction from Day Two in Sindelfingen De live-darts.com 1 mil
